All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractButton
Abstract base class for all button-like components in the microui framework.
AbstractColor
Abstract base class for color representations in the MicroUI framework.
AbstractEventSystem
Abstract base class for event detection systems in MicroUI.
AbstractGradientColor
Abstract base class for gradient color effects that interpolate between two colors.
AbstractShadow
Abstract base class for shadow effects that can be applied to ContentView components.
AbstractTheme
Abstract base class for defining color themes in the MicroUI framework.
AutoResizeMode
Enumeration defining the scaling factors for automatic text resizing in UI components.
BoundedValue
Represents a numeric value bounded between minimum and maximum limits.
BufferedView
Abstract base class for views that render to an off-screen graphics buffer.
Button
Represents a clickable button component with text and/or image content.
CheckBox
A CheckBox component that represents a binary state (checked or unchecked).
CheckBox.CheckStyle
Enumeration defining the visual styles for displaying a checked checkbox.
Clipboard
Utility class for clipboard operations with support for both system and local buffers.
Color
Concrete implementation of AbstractColor representing a solid RGBA color.
ColumnLayout
Layout manager that arranges child components in a vertical column.
ColumnLayoutParams
Layout parameters specifically for ColumnLayout, defining how components are positioned and sized within a vertical column arrangement.
Component
Abstract base class for all interactive UI components in the microui framework.
Container
Container component for organizing and managing GUI components.
Container.Entry
Represents an entry in the container, pairing a ContentView with its layout parameters.
Container.Mode
Container operation modes.
ContainerManager
Singleton manager for handling multiple Container instances and providing animation transitions between them.
ContainerManager.AnimatorMode
Animation modes for container transitions.
ContentView
Abstract base class for all GUI components that can be displayed and interacted with.
Debugger
Debugging utility class for managing debug mode settings.
Direction
Enumeration representing the four cardinal directions for UI navigation and movement.
DuplicateItemException
Exception thrown when attempting to add a duplicate item to a collection or container that does not allow duplicates.
Event
Concrete implementation of AbstractEventSystem providing direct access to all mouse event states.
EventType
Enumeration defining all possible mouse event types detected by the MicroUI event system.
FullSingleLineTextController
Comprehensive controller for managing single-line text input with advanced features.
FullSingleLineTextController.ValidationMode
Validation modes for text input.
GradientColor
A gradient color that dynamically transitions between two colors based on a boolean condition.
GradientLoopColor
A continuously looping gradient color that automatically animates between two colors.
GraphicsBuffer
A container for managing off-screen graphics buffers with composable buffered views.
GridLayout
Layout manager that arranges child components in a grid with specified columns and rows.
GridLayoutParams
Layout parameters for positioning components within a GridLayout.
Hover
Visual hover effect for Component elements with smooth fade-in/fade-out animation.
ImageBuffer
A spatial view component for displaying and manipulating images with color tinting.
InteractionHandler
Advanced event handler that manages event listeners and dispatches events to registered callbacks.
KeyPressable
Interface for components that can respond to keyboard input events.
Knob
A circular knob control for selecting values within a range.
LabeledCheckBox
A composite component that combines a CheckBox with a TextView to create a labeled checkbox.
LayoutManager
Abstract base class for layout managers that handle positioning and sizing of components within a container.
LayoutParams
Marker interface for layout parameters.
LinearAxisLayout
Abstract base class for linear axis layouts that arrange components along a single axis.
LinearAxisLayoutParams
Abstract base class for layout parameters used in linear axis layouts.
LinearLayout
Linear layout manager that arranges components in a single row or column.
LinearLayoutParams
Layout parameters for LinearLayout.
LinearRangeControl
Abstract base class for linear range control components (sliders, scrollbars).
Listener
Functional interface for event listeners in the MicroUI framework.
MathUtils
Utility class providing mathematical helper functions.
MenuButton
A hierarchical menu button component that can contain both plain items and sub-menus.
MenuButton.DirectionMode
Enumeration defining the direction modes for sub-menu placement.
Metrics
Metrics collection utility for tracking object creation statistics.
MicroUI
Core initialization and metadata class for the MicroUI library.
MicroUIException
Base exception class for all MicroUI framework exceptions.
MultiLineTextController
Controller for managing multi-line text with line-based operations and undo/redo functionality.
Orientation
Enumeration representing the two primary layout orientations for UI components.
PlainShadow
A simple shadow effect that creates a solid or gradient outline around a ContentView.
RangeControl
Abstract base class for range control components that allow selecting a numeric value within a specified range.
ReactiveShadow
A reactive shadow effect that dynamically adjusts its intensity based on mouse position.
RendererConfig
Provides setting for configuration of rendering mode
RendererConfig.Mode
Rendering modes for MicroUI component behavior.
RenderException
Exception thrown when rendering operations encounter errors or invalid states.
Ripples
Ripple effect animation that creates expanding circular waves from click/touch points.
RowLayout
Row layout manager that arranges components horizontally.
RowLayoutParams
Layout parameters for RowLayout.
Scroll
A scrollbar component with a draggable thumb for selecting values within a range.
Scrollable
Interface for components that can respond to mouse wheel scroll events.
SingleLineTextController
Controller for managing single-line text input with validation and event listeners.
Slider
A slider component for selecting values within a linear range.
SpatialAnimator
Animator for smooth interpolation of spatial properties (position and dimensions) between states.
SpatialAnimator.ReactionMode
Reaction modes for controlling animation triggering behavior.
SpatialState
Immutable record representing the spatial state of a view.
SpatialView
Abstract base class for GUI components that have spatial properties (position and dimensions).
SpatialView.HooksUpdateMode
Update modes for change hooks with different timing intervals.
Stroke
Represents a stroke style with color and weight properties for drawing outlines.
TextArea
A multi-line text editing component with support for selection, scrolling, copy/paste, undo/redo, and keyboard navigation.
TextEditorModel
A comprehensive text editor model that manages multi-line text editing operations, cursor positioning, and text selection.
TextField
A single-line text input field with support for text editing, selection, copy/paste, undo/redo, validation, and password masking.
TextTooltipContent
Tooltip content implementation that displays text with customizable styling.
TextView
A component for displaying text with automatic resizing, alignment, and clipping options.
ThemeBlack
Dark theme implementation with black/dark gray color scheme and gradient effects.
ThemeGlass
Glass/transparent theme implementation with subtle animations and translucent effects.
ThemeGray
Gray theme implementation with a monochromatic color scheme.
ThemeManager
Manager for handling theme selection and retrieval in the MicroUI framework.
ThemeWhite
Light theme implementation with a white/gray color scheme and gradient effects.
Timer
Timer utility for tracking progress between two endpoints over time.
Tooltip
Tooltip manager that displays contextual information when users hover over components.
TooltipContent
Abstract base class for tooltip content implementations.
TooltipManager
Manages tooltip display in the application.
View
Abstract base class for all visual elements in MicroUI.
Visible
Interface for components that have visibility states.
